member.summary: Represents the month, day, and year in MM dd yyyy format.

member.summary: Represents the month and year in MM yyyy format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerDateFormat.MMM_yyyy
member.summary: Represents the month and year in MMM yyyy format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerDateFormat.yyyy_MM_dd
member.summary: Represents the year, month, and day in yyyy MM dd format.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTextDisplayMode
member.summary: Defines the text display mode for the picker.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTextDisplayMode.Default
member.summary: Represents the picker items in default mode.
member.remarks: The default font size for the picker Text is 14, and the text color is white. The default text color for unselected items is black.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTextDisplayMode.Fade
member.summary: Represents the picker items in fade mode.
member.remarks: The default text display color will fade from the selected item.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTextDisplayMode.Shrink
member.summary: Represents the picker items in shrink mode.
member.remarks: The text font size will be reduced from the selected item, while the text color remains the same.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTextDisplayMode.FadeAndShrink
member.summary: Represents the picker items in fade and shrink mode.
member.remarks: The text display color will fade, and the text font size will be reduced from the selected item.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat
member.summary: Defines the picker time format for the SfTimePicker.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.H_mm
member.summary: Represents the hour and minute in H mm format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.H_mm_ss
member.summary: Represents the hour, minute, and second in H mm ss format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.h_mm_ss_tt
member.summary: Represents the hour, minute, second, and AM/PM designator in h mm ss tt format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.h_mm_tt
member.summary: Represents the hour, minute, and AM/PM designator in h mm tt format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.HH_mm
member.summary: Represents the hour and minute in HH mm format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.HH_mm_ss
member.summary: Represents the hour, minute and seconds in HH mm ss format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.HH_mm_ss_fff
member.summary: Represents 24-hour padded hour, minute, second, and milliseconds in HH_mm_ss_fff format. Example: 14_05_33_089 for 2:05 PM, 33 seconds, and 89 milliseconds.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.hh_mm_ss_tt
member.summary: Represents the hour, minute, second, and AM/PM designator in hh mm ss tt format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.hh_mm_ss_fff_tt
member.summary: Represents 12-hour padded hour, minute, second, milliseconds, and AM/PM in hh_mm_ss_fff_tt format. Example: 02_05_33_089_PM for 2:05 PM, 33 seconds, and 89 milliseconds.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.hh_mm_tt
member.summary: Represents the hour, minute, and AM/PM designator in hh mm tt format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.hh_tt
member.summary: Represents the hour and AM/PM designator in hh tt format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.mm_ss
member.summary: Represents minutes and seconds in mm_ss format. Example: 02_45 for 2 minutes and 45 seconds.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.mm_ss_fff
member.summary: Represents minutes, seconds, and milliseconds in mm_ss_fff format. Example: 03_12_256 for 3 minutes, 12 seconds, and 256 milliseconds.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.ss_fff
member.summary: Represents seconds and milliseconds in ss_fff format. Example: 15_007 for 15 seconds and 500 milliseconds.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerTimeFormat.Default
member.summary: Represents default culture based format of the Picker Time format.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.RelativePosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the relative position of the picker popup.

members.member:
Gets or sets the view relative to which the picker dialog should be displayed based on the RelativePosition.
It is only applicable for RelativeDialog mode. If no relative view is given, the picker base will be set as the relative view. >

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.HeaderTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the header template or template selector for picker header
member.remarks: The BindingContext of the HeaderTemplate is respective picker control. When using header template, the header style customization will not be applicable.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.ColumnHeaderTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the column header template or template selector for picker column header.
member.remarks: The BindingContext of the ColumnHeaderTemplate is respective picker control. When using column header template, the column header style customization will not be applicable.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.FooterTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the footer template or template selector for picker footer.
member.remarks: The BindingContext of the FooterTemplate is respective picker control. When using footer template, the footer style customization will not be applicable.

member.summary: Gets or sets the picker ok button clicked command.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.DeclineCommand
member.summary: Gets or sets the picker cancel button clicked command.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.EnableLooping
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the picker can perform looping.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.PopupWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the popup in the picker.
member.remarks: The default width of the popup will be the addition of picker column width.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.PopupHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the popup in the picker.
member.remarks: The default height of the popup will be the addition of header height, column header height, picker items' five items height, and footer height.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Picker.PickerBase.isPickerPreviouslyOpened
member.summary: Boolean to get the previous open state of the picker in the dialog mode. This value is used to maintain the previous state of the picker while changing the visibility of the picker in the dialog mode. While changing the IsOpen property of the picker dynamically in the Visibility change the property change will not trigger sometimes. So that we are updated the previous state of the picker when the IsOpen property changed.

member.summary: Gets or sets the selected item of the columns on SfPicker.

member.summary: Method used to request layout while the scroll view is scrolled. because the scroll view does not scroll properly while the previous scroll does not end correctly. Example, if dialog is closed while the scroll view scrolling on fast fling then the scroll view does not scroll to the exact position on first time due to incomplete previous scroll.
